title: thelypteris angustipinna
intro: Thelypteris angustipinna, also known as the narrow-pinnate male fern, is a species of fern belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae. The medicinal properties of Thelypteris angustipinna lie in its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to alleviate digestive problems, reduce fever, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, Thelypteris angustipinna is often used in teas, infusions, or as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
